name: youtube-safari
description: Thin YouTube-only IINA plugin with Safari cookies and Referer headers

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && parcel build . && node --check dist/index.js && node --check dist/global.js
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test scripts/batch-a-queue.test.mjs scripts/batch-a-selection.test.mjs scripts/batch-a-state.test.mjs scripts/batch-b-cache.test.mjs scripts/batch-b-sequence.test.mjs scripts/batch-c-side-effects.test.mjs scripts/batch-c-m3u.test.mjs scripts/batch-d-a11y.test.mjs scripts/batch-d-grid.test.mjs scripts/parse.test.mjs scripts/cookies.test.mjs scripts/shorts-map.test.mjs scripts/m3u.test.mjs && node --check dist/index.js

author: jarobinson-sarantoga
